text: I feel a quiet sense of curiosity here. The environment around me is modern, airy, and studious. The presence of glass walls and carefully arranged furniture makes me conscious of boundaries—both physical and intellectual. Moving into the exhibit space, I’m surrounded by vibrant colors and bold typography. Here, I feel energized by the celebration of research and development—a reminder that human ingenuity is an ongoing process, evolving and reshaping the world. There’s something both humbling and inspiring about being among so many ideas taking shape.
